chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7393 of 2022 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders as to maintainability. 25.02.2025 Mr. Mustafa Mamdani, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Khalid Rajper, advocate for the respondents 12 & 3. Mr. Muhammad Tahir Dogar, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the respondents 4 & 5. Kazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General. Per learned counsel, finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He seeks that the Department may be directed to finalize the assessment after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action shall be taken against the petitioners. Learned counsel for the Respondent department has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of aforesaid in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
